text: Standing in this modern, thoughtfully designed space, I feel a sense of anticipation and curiosity. The glass walls reveal other people engaged in their own tasks, and yet I am isolated in my quiet observations. Moving to the second space, surrounded by the vibrant R+D display, technology, and words, I am inspired and invigorated by the blend of knowledge and innovation. Here, the world feels open—each artifact and display a prompt for new questions about the nature of progress and our collective future.
